title: garcinia gummi-gutta var. papilla
intro: Garcinia gummi-gutta var. papilla, also known as the fruit of the garcinia tree, is a tropical plant species native to the Western Ghats of India. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to inhibit the production of citrate lyase, an enzyme involved in fat production, and its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include weight loss, improved blood sugar control, and reduced cholesterol levels, making it a popular natural remedy for obesity and metabolic disorders. Garcinia gummi-gutta var. papilla is typically prepared as a herbal supplement, often in the form of capsules, tablets, or powders, although it can also be consumed as a juice or added to teas.
